title: Password reset keeps saying token invalid
description: The customer used the latest reset email but still gets an invalid token error.

title: All users getting 503 from production
description: Production API is down and business users cannot access the portal.

title: Invoice has extra charges after plan change
description: Customer says invoice total changed after upgrade and includes unexpected usage.

title: Manager cannot view approvals page
description: A manager receives permission denied when opening the approval dashboard.

title: CSV import completed but records missing
description: Import summary says success but uploaded accounts are not visible in dashboard.

title: Suspicious login alert from another country
description: User received a login alert from a location they did not recognize.

title: Webhook events stopped after vendor change
description: Order events are no longer reaching the callback URL after vendor configuration update.

title: Monthly report numbers do not match export
description: Finance report total is different from exported transaction data for the same date range.

title: Large attachment fails during upload
description: A user cannot upload a 20 MB PDF file as supporting evidence.

title: Staging deployment failed after migration
description: The staging release failed because migration stopped during database update.

title: Payment failed but customer bank shows debit
description: Customer completed payment and amount was debited, but portal says payment failed.

title: Search API timing out during peak hours
description: Users report that search is slow and sometimes times out during peak usage.

title: Tenant user can see another company record
description: A user reports seeing a record that belongs to a different company.

title: Scheduled email report not received today
description: Managers did not receive the daily summary report email this morning.

title: User profile changes are not saved
description: User updates phone number and address but save fails with validation error.
